subject: [PATCH] fuse: fix race between inode/dentry invalidation and readdir

reviews.author: Luis Henriques
reviews.summary: Reviewer Luis Henriques expressed skepticism about the existence of a race condition between inode/dentry invalidation and readdir, suggesting that userspace is responsible for synchronization and requesting more information about a reproducible test case.
reviews.raw_body:
Unfortunately no, I do not have any reproducer.  And from looking at the
code I couldn't find anything else.  I'll have to look closer into the
user-space code doing the invalidation to try to understand what else
could be at play here.  And again, thank you for your feedback, Joanne.

Cheers,
-- 
Luís

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch fixes a potential data corruption issue in FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) by ensuring that stale directory entries are not returned during readdir operations after an inode or dentry has been invalidated.
